auth_privacy_note: Your health data is stored securely on EU servers and never shared without your consent.
welcome_headline: Understand your body through the change.
welcome_subtitle: SYNA connects your daily check-ins and wearable data into insights you and your doctor can act on.
register_subtitle: Create your account to begin tracking, in about two minutes a day.
register_verification_prompt: Enter the verification code sent to your email.
login_subtitle: Pick up where you left off.
forgot_password_email_prompt: Enter your email to receive a reset code.
forgot_password_verify_prompt: Enter the code from your email and choose a new password.
auth_generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth_reset_success: Password reset complete. You can now log in.
